articles.description: Follow live text coverage and radio commentary as Newcastle travel to face Barcelona, Liverpool host Galatasaray, Tottenham take on Atletico Madrid and Bayern Munich face Atalanta.
articles.title: Champions League LIVE: Barcelona vs Newcastle, Liverpool vs Galatasaray, Spurs vs Atletico Madrid & Bayern vs Atalanta scores & updates

articles.description: Liverpool deliver a scintillating performance to put four goals past Galatasaray and set up a Champions League quarter-final against PSG.
articles.title: Liverpool 4-0 Galatasaray (4-1 agg): Mohamed Salah impresses as Reds reach Champions League quarter-finals

articles.description: Spurs are unable to pull off a comeback despite victory against Atletico Madrid in Champions League last-16 second leg - the first under boss Igor Tudor.
articles.title: Tottenham Hotspur 3-2 (5-7 on agg) Atletico Madrid: First win for Spurs under Igor Tudor but Atleti reach quarter-finals

articles.description: Raphinha and Robert Lewandowski each score twice as a rampant Barcelona dump Newcastle United out of the Champions League.
articles.title: Barcelona 7-2 Newcastle United: Raphinha and Robert Lewandowki score twice in thrashing

articles.description: Senegal say "we will stop at nothing" in their fight to overturn the decision to strip them of the Africa Cup of Nations title.
articles.title: Afcon 2025: Senegal say 'fight is far from over' after Morocco awarded title

articles.description: Rory McIlroy will use one of his mother's favourite dishes among appetisers that also include elk when he hosts the traditional champion's dinner at the Masters.
articles.title: Rory McIlroy: Masters champion's dinner to feature elk and one of his mother's dishes

articles.description: BBC Sport journalists and pundits look at what happened at the chaotic Afcon final, and what comes next.
articles.title: Morocco vs Senegal Afcon final: How African football 'needs to move on'

articles.description: Greater Manchester's mayor hopes funding infrastructure could strengthen Bolton's bid.
articles.title: Bolton bids to become first English Ryder Cup host in over 30 years

articles.description: West Ham hold Manchester United to a draw which deals a significant blow to their hopes of challenging leaders Manchester City.
articles.title: West Ham 0-0 Manchester United: Battling Hammers hold Red Devils

articles.description: Tom Pidcock launches a late attack to win the Milano-Torino race on the 150th anniversary of the world's oldest classic.
articles.title: Milano-Torino 2026: Tom Pidcock wins on debut in world's oldest classic
